phrases.intent_en: Ask how to get up to the village from the beach
phrases.text_local: Scusi, come si sale al centro del paese dalla spiaggia?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, KOH-meh see SAH-leh al CHEN-troh del PAH-eh-zeh DAL-lah SPYAD-jah?
phrases.cultural_note: Positano is built vertically — the only way up is on foot along the steep steps or by taking the local bus on the main road.

responses.english: Up the stairways — the most direct is via dei Mulini.
responses.phonetic: per leh skah-lee-NAH-teh — lah PYOO dee-RET-tah eh VEE-ah day moo-LEE-nee.
responses.french: Per le scalinate — la più diretta è via dei Mulini.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Church of Santa Maria Assunta is
phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, dov'è la Chiesa di Santa Maria Assunta?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, doh-VEH lah KYEH-zah dee SAN-tah mah-REE-ah as-SOON-tah?

responses.english: At the top of the main staircase, with the majolica dome.
responses.phonetic: een CHEE-mah AL-lah skah-lee-NAH-tah preen-chee-PAH-leh, kon lah KOO-poh-lah mah-yoh-lee-KAH-tah.
responses.french: In cima alla scalinata principale, con la cupola maiolicata.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the best boutiques for local ceramics are
phrases.text_local: Scusi, dove si comprano le ceramiche locali tipiche?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, DOH-veh see KOM-prah-noh leh cheh-RAH-mee-keh loh-KAH-lee TEE-pee-keh?

responses.english: Along Via dei Mulini, many artisan workshops.
responses.phonetic: LOON-goh VEE-ah day moo-LEE-nee, MOL-teh bot-TEH-gheh ar-tee-JAH-neh.
responses.french: Lungo Via dei Mulini, molte botteghe artigiane.

phrases.intent_en: Ask how long the walk up to the SP425 main road takes
phrases.text_local: Scusi, quanto tempo ci vuole per salire alla strada principale?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, KWAN-toh TEM-poh chee VWOH-leh per sah-LEE-reh AL-lah STRAH-dah preen-chee-PAH-leh?

responses.english: About twenty minutes on foot up the steps.
responses.phonetic: CHEER-kah VEN-tee mee-NOO-tee ah PYEH-dee per leh SKAH-leh.
responses.french: Circa venti minuti a piedi per le scale.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to find a good lemon granita
phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, dov'è una buona granita al limone?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, doh-VEH OO-nah BWOH-nah grah-NEE-tah al lee-MOH-neh?

responses.english: At Bar Internazionale, on the main square.
responses.phonetic: dah bar een-ter-nah-tsyoh-NAH-leh, SOOL-lah PYAHT-tsah preen-chee-PAH-leh.
responses.french: Da Bar Internazionale, sulla piazza principale.
